title: Token Unlock Tracker
description: Monitor Transfer events from known vesting/lock contracts to track token unlocks as they happen — build an unlock calendar or alert system.
useCase: Build a token unlock monitor that watches a vesting contract address for Transfer events and alerts when tokens are released, showing recipient, amount, and USD value.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain where the vesting contract is deployed
keyParams.vestingContractAddress: Address of the vesting or lock contract to watch for outgoing transfers
keyParams.startDate: Start date for unlock scan in YYYY-MM-DD format
keyParams.endDate: End date for unlock scan in YYYY-MM-DD format
